title: Front Office Manager - Compass Group India Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Compass Group India Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Compass Group India Digital Technologies in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Compass Group India Digital Technologies:
Compass Group India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India Digital Technologies!
